  Privacy Manifesto

We built BetterNotes
around one radical idea.

Your notes are yours. Not ours. Not advertisers'. Yours — and only yours.

We can't sell your data because we don't have it.

Everything you write stays on your device. We never see it, collect it, or store it on any server.

No ads. No tracking. No exceptions.

No analytics SDKs, no third-party trackers, no ad networks. BetterNotes is clean — by design, not by policy.

Your notes stay on your device. Always.

No cloud sync means no breach. Lock individual notes with biometrics. Your secrets remain yours.

Read our Privacy Policy

  Features

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Notes, checklists, and a speed reader — all offline, all private.

Notes

Capture Everything.
Lose Nothing.

Rich text notes with folders, colour themes, and drawing support. Organised your way — on your device, forever.

Star your most important notes for instant access. Lock sensitive ones behind biometrics.

Feature Unlocked

Checklists

Check It Off.
No Cloud Required.

Simple, fast checklists for shopping, packing, tasks — anything. Check items off, delete, reorder. No account needed.

Your lists never leave your phone. No sync means no surprise data bills.

RSVP Speed Reader

Read Faster.
Think Deeper.

Rapid Serial Visual Presentation flashes words one at a time so your eyes never move — doubling or tripling your reading speed.

Pre-register now to unlock unlimited RSVP notes free at launch. Free tier is limited to 3 notes.

Library

Your Knowledge Base.
Offline. Forever.

Save long-form articles, essays, and documents to your personal library. Read them at your own pace — with the RSVP reader or normally.

No internet required. Your library is yours, on your device.

  The Developer

TachyonDev Net

Building software that respects you — your data, your privacy, your device.

Who We Are

TachyonDev Net is an independent software studio focused on one thing: building tools that work for you, not against you. We believe the best software is honest software — clear in what it does, minimal in what it takes, and permanent in the value it provides.

Privacy by Architecture

BetterNotes is offline-first by design. There's no server to breach because there is no server. Your notes live on your device and stay there — always.

Independent Studio

Every line of code, every design decision, every word of copy is crafted with intention. No investors to appease, no growth hacks to run — just great software built right.

Honest Monetization

BetterNotes earns revenue through a monthly subscription or a one-time Lifetime Premium upgrade. No ads. No data harvesting. Either way, your notes never leave your device.

The App

BetterNotes is our flagship application — a private, feature-rich note-taking experience built exclusively for Android.

June 10 Launch Date, 2026
Android Platform
Zero Data Collected

Our Philosophy

We started from a simple premise: a note-taking app has no business knowing anything about you. Your thoughts, your lists, your ideas — they're yours. The simplest way to protect them is to never touch them in the first place. So we don't.

"We can't sell your data because we don't have it."

Questions, feedback, or just want to say hello? Reach us at tachyon@tachyondev.net — we read every message.

  Legal

Privacy Policy

We built BetterNotes so that this document would be short. Because we genuinely don't collect anything.

Last updated: April 13, 2026  ·  Developer: TachyonDev Net

BetterNotes ("the app") is a private note-taking application developed by TachyonDev Net. This policy explains how the app handles your information.

1. Data We Collect

The app does not collect, transmit, or share any personal data. All content you create — notes, checklists, RSVP readers, folders, drawings, and settings — is stored exclusively on your device and never sent to any external server.

2. Local Storage

The following information is stored locally on your device only:

  • Note and checklist content, titles, and timestamps
  • RSVP reader content
  • Folder names and organization
  • Drawing files (saved as images in the app's private storage)
  • App settings (theme, sort preferences, premium status)

This data is never uploaded, synced to a cloud service, or shared with third parties.

3. Biometric Authentication

The app offers an optional biometric lock feature (fingerprint or face unlock) to protect specific notes. This uses your device's built-in biometric system (Android BiometricPrompt API). No biometric data is accessed, stored, or transmitted by the app.

4. Payments and Subscriptions

BetterNotes offers an optional premium upgrade via Google Play Billing. All payment processing is handled entirely by Google. The developer does not receive or store any payment card information. Your purchase status is stored locally on your device to unlock premium features.

5. Analytics and Tracking

The app contains no analytics, advertising, or tracking SDKs. We do not collect usage data, crash reports, or device identifiers.

6. Permissions

BetterNotes does not request any Android permissions. The app does not access the internet, camera, microphone, location, or contacts.

7. Children's Privacy

BetterNotes is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect any information from children.

8. Changes to This Policy

If the app's data practices change in a future update, this policy will be updated and the "Last updated" date revised. Continued use of the app after any changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

9. Contact

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact: tachyon@tachyondev.net

  Legal

Pre-Registration Terms

The terms governing the free Lifetime Premium reward for BetterNotes pre-registrants.

Effective: May 12, 2026  ·  Developer: TachyonDev Net

These Terms & Conditions govern the pre-registration reward offered by TachyonDev Net ("the developer") for the BetterNotes application ("the app") on Google Play. By pre-registering, you agree to these terms.

1. The Reward

Users who pre-register BetterNotes on Google Play before its public launch date will receive Lifetime Premium access at no charge. Lifetime Premium unlocks:

  • Unlimited RSVP reader notes (free tier is limited to 3)
  • All colour themes — Rose, Sky, and Green
  • Note locking via biometric or device PIN

This reward is a one-time product grant, not a subscription. No recurring charge will ever apply to this reward.

2. Eligibility

  • You must have a valid Google account and pre-register via the official Google Play listing for BetterNotes.
  • One reward per Google account. Duplicate accounts or fraudulent pre-registrations will be disqualified.
  • You must download and open the app after its public launch to activate the reward.

3. How the Reward is Delivered

Google Play automatically credits the Lifetime Premium reward to qualifying pre-registered users once the app launches. No purchase, payment, promo code, or manual redemption is required. The reward is tied to the Google account used to pre-register and cannot be transferred to another account.

4. Claim Window

The pre-registration window closes at the app's public launch date. You must download and open the app within 14 days of the public launch date to activate your reward. Rewards not claimed within this window may be forfeited.

5. Meaning of "Lifetime"

"Lifetime" refers to the supported lifetime of BetterNotes on Google Play — that is, for as long as the developer continues to publish and maintain the app. If the developer discontinues the app, at least 30 days' written notice will be provided via this page and/or the Google Play listing.

6. General Conditions

  • The reward has no cash value and is non-transferable.
  • The reward cannot be exchanged for any other product or service.
  • Void where prohibited by applicable law.
  • The developer reserves the right to disqualify users who abuse, manipulate, or fraudulently exploit the pre-registration system.
  • The developer reserves the right to modify or cancel this reward with reasonable notice (see Section 13).

7. United States

Sponsor: TachyonDev Net — tachyon@tachyondev.net

  • No purchase necessary to participate or receive the reward.
  • Open to US residents aged 13 or older.
  • Void where prohibited by law.
  • This offer complies with applicable Federal Trade Commission (FTC) disclosure requirements. The reward is free with no conditions of purchase.

8. European Union

  • This reward involves no monetary consideration from the consumer; accordingly, the EU right of withdrawal (Directive 2011/83/EU) does not apply.
  • EU consumers retain all statutory rights under applicable national consumer protection law.
  • Complaints may be submitted to your competent national consumer authority or via the EU Online Dispute Resolution platform at ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr.
  • This offer does not involve processing of personal data by the developer beyond what Google Play collects under its own Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

9. Australia

  • This reward is administered in accordance with the Australian Consumer Law (Schedule 2, Competition and Consumer Act 2010).
  • This is a free, non-chance-based digital reward. No promotional permit is required under NSW, SA, or ACT trade promotion lottery legislation as this reward is not determined by chance.
  • Statutory consumer guarantees under the ACL apply to the app and its features.
  • Australian queries: tachyon@tachyondev.net

10. South Africa

  • This reward is offered in accordance with the Consumer Protection Act 68 of 2008 (CPA) of South Africa.
  • The reward is presented honestly and is not misleading. There is no risk of financial loss to the consumer.
  • Consumers have the right to receive the reward as described if all eligibility conditions are met.
  • South African queries: tachyon@tachyondev.net

11. Mexico

  • This reward is offered in accordance with the Ley Federal de Protección al Consumidor (Federal Consumer Protection Law) and applicable regulations issued by PROFECO.
  • The reward is free of charge and involves no obligation of purchase or payment by the consumer.
  • The reward is presented honestly and is not misleading or deceptive under Mexican consumer law.
  • Mexican queries: tachyon@tachyondev.net

12. Other Countries

If you are participating from a country not specifically listed above, the following general terms apply:

  • This reward is offered in good faith and is free of charge with no obligation of purchase.
  • The reward is subject to the laws and regulations of your country of residence.
  • The developer makes no representation that this offer is available or lawful in all jurisdictions. If participation is restricted or prohibited in your jurisdiction, you should not participate.
  • Queries: tachyon@tachyondev.net

13. Changes to These Terms

The developer may modify or withdraw these Terms & Conditions with at least 7 days' notice posted at this URL. Continued participation after notice constitutes acceptance of the updated terms. If the reward is withdrawn after pre-registration has already occurred, users who pre-registered before the withdrawal notice will still receive the reward.

14. Contact

For any questions regarding this reward or these terms, contact: tachyon@tachyondev.net
